stories.title: Markdown Rendering in React Native
stories.description: Implement markdown rendering for AI chat responses in React Native. Support common markdown elements (headers, bold, italic, lists, code blocks, links) with proper sizing that complements the app's typography.
acceptanceCriteria: Install and configure react-native-markdown-display or similar library
Markdown renders correctly for headers (h1-h6), bold, italic, lists, code blocks, and links
Font sizes are proportional and complement the existing app typography
Markdown renders well in both light and dark mode
ChatMessage component uses markdown rendering for AI responses

stories.title: Therapist-style AI System Prompt
stories.description: Create a thoughtful therapist-style system prompt for the journaling AI. The AI should be reflective, ask open-ended questions, validate emotions, and avoid giving direct advice too quickly. Focus on active listening and helping users explore their thoughts.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt is added to the AI service configuration
AI responds with reflective, empathetic tone
AI asks open-ended questions to help users explore thoughts
AI validates emotions before offering any suggestions
AI does not jump to giving advice immediately

stories.title: Journal History Screen
stories.description: Create a Journal History screen that matches the example-design/journal-history.html exactly. Include weekly groupings, entry cards with emoji/title, date headers, and the floating action button (FAB) design.
acceptanceCriteria: New JournalHistory screen created with navigation
Design matches journal-history.html exactly (colors, spacing, typography)
Entries grouped by week with date headers
Entry cards show day abbreviation, emoji, and title
FAB (floating action button) with pink edit icon is present
Bottom navigation bar with Today, Explore, Entries, Settings tabs
Light and dark mode supported matching the HTML design

stories.title: Navigation Between Chat and History
stories.description: Implement navigation flow: FAB button on history screen creates new chat, X button on chat screen returns to history. Add tab navigation for the main app sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing FAB (edit button) on history screen navigates to new chat
Pressing X button on chat header returns to journal history
Tab navigation works for Today, Explore, Entries, Settings
Navigation state is properly managed

stories.title: Save and Finish Journal Entry
stories.description: Implement 'Finish Entry' functionality that saves the current chat as a completed journal entry to history. Generate a title and extract mood emoji from the conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing 'Finish Entry' saves the chat to journal history
Entry is marked as completed (not draft)
Title is generated from conversation content (or AI generates it)
Mood emoji is extracted or inferred from conversation
Entry appears in journal history with correct date grouping
After finishing, user is navigated back to history screen

stories.title: Draft Functionality for Unfinished Entries
stories.description: When user closes a chat (X button) without finishing, auto-save as draft. Drafts appear in a separate tab in journal history and can be resumed.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing X on chat with content saves entry as draft
Draft entries are stored separately from completed entries
Drafts tab in header or journal history shows draft entries
Tapping a draft entry resumes the chat with previous messages
Draft is converted to completed entry when 'Finish Entry' is pressed

stories.title: Journal Entry Storage Service
stories.description: Create a storage service for persisting journal entries (completed and drafts) using AsyncStorage or similar. Include CRUD operations and data model.
acceptanceCriteria: JournalEntry type defined with id, title, emoji, messages, status (draft/completed), createdAt, updatedAt
Storage service with create, read, update, delete, list operations
Entries persist across app restarts
Service is testable with mock storage
